title: alchemilla vulgaris var. reniformis
intro: Alchemilla vulgaris var. reniformis, also known as the kidney-leaved lady's mantle or reniform lady's mantle, is a variety of the common lady's mantle plant, characterized by its unique kidney-shaped leaves. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and astringent properties, which are attributed to its high content of tannins and flavonoids. The health benefits of Alchemilla vulgaris var. reniformis include its potential to soothe menstrual cramps, reduce bleeding, and promote wound healing, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for women's health. Alchemilla vulgaris var. reniformis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
